title.ko: 충전물에 사용하기 위한 방법, 장비, 또는 기계; 달리 분류되지 않는 충전물
title.en: METHODS, EQUIPMENT, OR MACHINES FOR USE IN UPHOLSTERING; UPHOLSTERY NOT OTHERWISE PROVIDED FOR

definition.ko: 유리(遊離) 상태의 충전물재료; 그 취급; 탄성 패드 B68G1/00; 3/00; 5/00 충전물로 껍데기를 씌워서 된 물품의 제조; 내부 스프링의 부착 B68G7/00; 9/00 충전물로 껍데기를 씌워서 완성된 물품; 충전된 깔개 B68G11/00; 13/00 보조장치 또는 기구 B68G15/00

title.en: Loose filling materials for upholstery

title.ko: 충전물로 채워서 된 물품의 충전 재료로서 특별히 그와 같은 물품에 적합한 충전 재료의 처리
title.en: Treating materials to adapt them specially as upholstery filling
Cleaning; Conditioning
Teasing; Untwisting ropes or cords of filling materials
Curling; Twisting filling materials into ropes or cords
Preparation of bed feathers from natural feathers

title.ko: 침대용 깃털의 세정 또는 조제( B68G 3/02가 우선)
title.en: Cleaning or conditioning of bed feathers (B68G0003020000 takes precedence)
Sorting of bed feathers
Resilient upholstery pads (finished upholstery B68G0011000000)

title.ko: 세포상 재료, 예. 스폰지 고무(다공질 또는 세포질 물품의 제조를 위한 플라스틱 혹은 가소 상태의 물질 형성 B29C)
title.en: of cellular material, e.g. sponge rubber (shaping of plastics or substances in a plastic state for the production of porous or cellular articles B29C)

title.ko: 충전물로 채워서 된 물품의 제조(충전된 깔개의 제조 B68G 13/00; 봉제 기계 D05B)
title.en: Making upholstery (manufacturing upholstered panels B68G0013000000;sewing-machines D05B)

title.ko: 충전면, 플리스, 매트 또는 유사물에 의한 충전물로 채워서 된 물품의 제조(충전 방법 B68G 7/06)
title.en: Making upholstery from waddings, fleeces, mats, or the like (filling methods B68G0007060000)
by conveyor-line methods
Covering or enveloping cores of pads
with webs secured to the core, e.g. by stitching
Arrangements of sheathings between spring cores and overlying paddings
Filling of cushions, mattresses, or the like
Quilting (tools B68G0015000000); Elements therefor
Finishing of edges
Other elements specially adapted for fastening, fixing, or finishing, in upholstery work
Placing upholstery springs in pockets; Fitting springs in upholstery
Finished upholstery not provided for in other classes
mainly composed of fibrous materials
with stitched or bonded fibre webs
mainly composed of resilient materials, e.g. of foam rubber
with embedded springs, e.g. bonded

title.ko: 충전물이 채워진 깔개(특히 흡음에 적합한 것 E04B, G10K)
title.en: Upholstered panels (specially adapted for sound-absorption E04B, G10K)
with indented pattern formed by stitching
with indented pattern formed by bonding
Auxiliary devices or tools specially for upholstery
Subject matter not provided for in other groups of this subclass
